name: Fat Free Fudge- Good
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring sugar, cocoa, and milk to a full boil, constantly stirring.
2. Once the mixture reaches a rolling boil, stop stirring and use a candy thermometer to reach the soft ball stage (234°F).
3. Remove from heat and sprinkle butter buds and extracts on top.
4. Allow the temperature to drop to 110°F.
5. Beat thoroughly until it loses its glossiness.
6. Quickly spread in an 8 or 9-inch pan.
7. Cool and cut.
NOTES: Per Serving
Calories - 45
Total Fat - .1g
2%
